posts.title: How I Built CareerGuide Hub
posts.excerpt: A breakdown of building a full-stack career platform with React, Node.js, Express, and Supabase—featuring an AI CV Analyzer, a job board, and a LinkedIn-style network, deployed to Vercel.

posts.title: Building My Portfolio with Vanilla JS
posts.excerpt: Why I chose HTML/CSS/JS over a framework for my portfolio, and what I learned about performance, theming, and GitHub Pages.
